BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-CircosContacts
BundleInfo.Author: KeitaPhD Tools
BundleInfo.Synopsis: Generate circos contact plots from open ChimeraX models.
BundleInfo.Description: Adds the 'circoscontacts' command to aggregate ChimeraX contacts over open or selected atomic models and render an interactive circos HTML view.

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: Command :: circoscontacts :: Structure Analysis :: Generate circos contacts plot from open or selected models
